title: Chess and Kuromarimo Merge
description: On pages 4–7, this part focuses on chess and kuromarimo merge, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Chess and Kuromarimo Merge. Chopper fights Chessmarimo with the power of the Rumble Ball while the struggle for Drum Castle intensifies. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: Ha! So you can transform, can you now!?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: That must mean you're also a devil fruit user!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: A Zoan-type fruit like Dalton's! You're a Reindeer- Human!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: What's the difference!? The important thing here is that I've already memorized the three forms of your 20an fruit!

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: You've already shown me all 3 of your forms...

dialogue.speaker: Chessmarimo
dialogue.text: You're a power- fighter just like Dalton!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: But you really think you can beat me in terms of raw strength!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: How can he jump so high !?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: What's that form supposed to be!?

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: I thought your hybrid form was that midget Reindeer on two legs!?

dialogue.speaker: Wapol
dialogue.text: A 20an- fruit should be limited to only 3 forms!

summary: This part highlights chess and kuromarimo merge and moves the chapter forward through its central emotional or plot turn.
